The '''barrelchest anchor''' is a two-handed [[spiked]] weapon and [[quest items|quest item]] acquired in [[The Great Brain Robbery]]. 60 [[Attack]] and 40 [[Strength]] are required to wield it. It is obtained after killing [[Barrelchest]]. 

Players receive this item in a broken state and must pay [[Smith]] on the docks of [[Mos Le'Harmless]] a fee of {{NoCoins|230,000}} [[coins]] to repair the anchor ([[Book o' piracy]] is needed to properly speak with Smith). If the anchor is lost, players can retrieve another damaged anchor from [[Brother Tranquility]] or purchase a repaired one from [[Perdu]] for {{NoCoins|290,000}} coins. Similar to the [[Bearhead]], players do ''not'' need to complete [[The Great Brain Robbery]] in order to use or reclaim the Barrelchest anchor. 

The anchor has a soft requirement of 50 [[Prayer]] in order to start [[The Great Brain Robbery]]. Many [[Combat pure|combat pures]] may still opt to complete the quest as [[Smite]] requires 52 Prayer.

The barrelchest anchor's stats are almost equal to those of [[Dharok's greataxe]]. It is well known as a [[PKing]] weapon, used in combos such as anchor to [[Granite maul]] [[special attack|specials]].

It can be upgraded to the [[Barrelchest anchor (bh)]] with a [[Barrelchest anchor imbue scroll]], which has a +10 increased crush and strength bonus and a +15% increase to the special attack's damage. The upgraded version can only be used for [[PvP]] in the [[Bounty Hunter]] [[Minigames|minigame]], [[Castle Wars]], [[Clan Wars]] and [[Soul Wars]] however.

==Special attack==
[[File:Sunder.gif|thumb|220px|A player using the barrelchest anchor's special attack, ''Sunder''.]]
The barrelchest anchor has a [[special attacks|special attack]], ''Sunder'', which doubles the player's accuracy, increases max damage by 10%, and drains the opponent's combat stats equivalent by 10% of the damage dealt in the following order: [[Defence]], [[Attack]], [[Ranged]], then [[Magic]].{{CiteTwitter|author=Mod Ash|url=https://twitter.com/JagexAsh/status/527028530203623424|date=28 October 2014|archiveurl=https://reldo.runescape.wiki/i/106221|archivedate=26 May 2020|quote=Anchor: 200% accuracy, 110% max hit. Drains one stat by 10% of damage - if Defence is already on 1, it drains Attack, etc.}} This consumes 50% of the player's special attack energy.

The stat drain total is based on 10% of the base damage roll, and will not take into account any modifiers applied at a later point in the calculation.{{CiteTwitter|author=Mod Ash|url=https://twitter.com/JagexAsh/status/1457738423477940224|date=8 November 2021|archiveurl=https://reldo.runescape.wiki/i/109271|archivedate=24 December 2022|quote=It's 10% of the damage *rolled*. If there's an effect that can modify the damage after the roll, the drain would still be based on the original damage amount. (...)}}

==Creation==
The player must have the [[Book o' piracy]] when talking to the Smith in order to access the repair feature.

{{Subject changes
|date = 20 March 2007
|update = Cows, Chickens, Rabbits and the Fishing Trawler
|change = *The strength bonus was increased from 87 to 100.
*The crush attack was increased from 80 to 92.
*The item's value was increased from 50,000 to 230,000.
*The anchor now costs 230k to repair, instead of 700k.
}}
{{Subject changes
|date = 13 March 2007
|update = Burgh de Rott Ramble
|change = *The strength bonus was increased to 87.
*The attack speed was decreased.
*The "Drop" option was replaced with a "Destroy" option.
*The anchor now costs 700k to repair, instead of 50k.
*The anchor now turns into 230k coins upon death.
}}
